---

title: "Products Pipeline Patterns"
subtitle: "ETL Patterns for Product Catalog Data"
category: "ETL Pipelines - Products"
level: "CH11.03"
status: "Active"
created: "2025-08-29"
modified: "2025-12-26"
version: "2.1"
principle_refs:
  - "MP104: ETL Data Flow Separation"
  - "MP102: ETL Output Standardization"
  - "MP107: ETL Pipeline Independence"
  - "DM_R052: Cross-Platform Product Identification"
---

# Products Pipeline Patterns

## Overview

The products pipeline handles product catalog data including profiles, properties, and attributes. This pipeline often involves processing data from Google Sheets or APIs with multilingual content.

## Pipeline Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "0IM: Import Phase"
        A1[Google Sheets] --> B1[Raw Product Profiles]
        A2[Product API] --> B2[Raw Product Properties]
        B1 --> C1[df_product_profile_{line}___raw]
        B2 --> C2[df_product_property___raw]
    end

    subgraph "1ST: Staging Phase"
        C1 --> D1[Validate & Optimize]
        C2 --> D2[Validate & Optimize]
        D1 --> E1[df_product_profile_{line}___staged]
        D2 --> E2[df_product_property___staged]
    end

    subgraph "2TR: Transform Phase"
        E1 --> F1[df_product_profile_{line}___transformed]
        E2 --> F2[df_product_property___transformed]
    end
```

## Product Profile Pattern

### 0IM: Import Product Profiles

```r
# {platform}_ETL_products_0IM.R
autoinit()

tryCatch({
  # Load product line configuration
  product_lines <- dbGetQuery(app_data, "SELECT * FROM df_product_line WHERE is_active = 1")

  # Import each product line
  for (i in 1:nrow(product_lines)) {
    product_line <- product_lines[i, ]
    sheet_name <- paste0("product_profile_", product_line$product_line_id)

    # Import from Google Sheets
    profile_data <- googlesheets4::read_sheet(
      config$sheet_id,
      sheet = sheet_name
    )

    # Add metadata
    profile_data$import_timestamp <- Sys.time()
    profile_data$product_line_id <- product_line$product_line_id

    # Write to raw layer
    table_name <- paste0("df_product_profile_", product_line$product_line_id)
    dbWriteTable(raw_data, table_name, profile_data, overwrite = TRUE)

    message("Imported ", nrow(profile_data), " products for ", product_line$product_line_id)
  }

}, error = function(e) {
  stop("0IM failed: ", e$message)
})

autodeinit()
```

### 1ST: Stage Product Profiles

```r
# {platform}_ETL_products_1ST.R
autoinit()

tryCatch({
  # Get all raw product profile tables
  raw_tables <- dbListTables(raw_data)
  profile_tables <- raw_tables[grepl("^df_product_profile_", raw_tables)]

  for (table_name in profile_tables) {
    # Read raw data
    raw_data_df <- dbReadTable(raw_data, table_name)

    # Apply data type optimization
    staged_data <- raw_data_df %>%
      mutate(
        # Clean numeric fields
        price = as.numeric(gsub("[^0-9.]", "", price)),
        rating = as.numeric(rating),
        num_rating = as.integer(num_rating),

        # Fix encoding
        product_title = iconv(product_title, to = "UTF-8"),
        product_brand = iconv(product_brand, to = "UTF-8"),

        # Staging metadata
        staged_timestamp = Sys.time(),
        validation_status = "passed"
      )

    # Write to staged layer
    staged_table_name <- paste0(table_name, "___staged")
    dbWriteTable(staged_data_db, staged_table_name, staged_data, overwrite = TRUE)
  }

}, error = function(e) {
  stop("1ST failed: ", e$message)
})

autodeinit()
```

### 2TR: Transform Product Profiles

```r
# {platform}_ETL_products_2TR.R
autoinit()

tryCatch({
  # Get all staged product profile tables
  staged_tables <- dbListTables(staged_data)
  profile_tables <- staged_tables[grepl("___staged$", staged_tables)]

  for (table_name in profile_tables) {
    # Read staged data
    staged_data_df <- dbReadTable(staged_data, table_name)

    # Apply column mapping using aliases
    transformed_data <- staged_data_df %>%
      rename_with_aliases(config$list_colname_aliases) %>%
      mutate(
        # Standardize product ID
        product_id = as.character(product_id),

        # Calculate derived fields
        price_tier = case_when(
          price < 10 ~ "budget",
          price < 50 ~ "mid",
          price < 100 ~ "premium",
          TRUE ~ "luxury"
        ),

        # Add transformation metadata
        transform_timestamp = Sys.time(),
        schema_version = "2TR_v2.0"
      )

    # Write to transformed layer
    transformed_table_name <- gsub("___staged$", "___transformed", table_name)
    dbWriteTable(transformed_data_db, transformed_table_name, transformed_data, overwrite = TRUE)
  }

}, error = function(e) {
  stop("2TR failed: ", e$message)
})

autodeinit()
```

## Product Properties Pattern

For comment properties, review attributes, and other product-related metadata:

### 0IM: Import Product Properties

```r
# {platform}_ETL_properties_0IM.R
autoinit()

tryCatch({
  # Import from Google Sheets (multi-sheet)
  properties_all <- list()

  for (product_line in product_lines$product_line_id) {
    sheet_data <- googlesheets4::read_sheet(
      config$sheet_id,
      sheet = product_line
    )

    sheet_data$product_line_id <- product_line
    properties_all[[product_line]] <- sheet_data
  }

  # Combine all product lines
  properties_raw <- bind_rows(properties_all)
  properties_raw$import_timestamp <- Sys.time()

  # Write to raw layer
  dbWriteTable(raw_data, "df_product_property___raw", properties_raw, overwrite = TRUE)

}, error = function(e) {
  stop("0IM failed: ", e$message)
})

autodeinit()
```

### 1ST: Stage Product Properties

```r
# {platform}_ETL_properties_1ST.R
autoinit()

tryCatch({
  # Read raw properties
  properties_raw <- dbReadTable(raw_data, "df_product_property___raw")

  # Stage with validation
  properties_staged <- properties_raw %>%
    mutate(
      # Clean property fields
      property_id = as.integer(property_id),
      property_name = iconv(property_name, to = "UTF-8"),
      property_name_english = iconv(property_name_english, to = "UTF-8"),

      # Validate required fields
      is_valid = !is.na(property_id) & !is.na(property_name),

      # Staging metadata
      staged_timestamp = Sys.time()
    ) %>%
    filter(is_valid)

  # Check for duplicates
  duplicates <- properties_staged %>%
    group_by(product_line_id, property_id) %>%
    filter(n() > 1)

  if (nrow(duplicates) > 0) {
    warning("Found ", nrow(duplicates), " duplicate properties")
  }

  # Write to staged layer
  dbWriteTable(staged_data, "df_product_property___staged", properties_staged, overwrite = TRUE)

}, error = function(e) {
  stop("1ST failed: ", e$message)
})

autodeinit()
```

### 2TR: Transform Product Properties

```r
# {platform}_ETL_properties_2TR.R
autoinit()

tryCatch({
  # Read staged properties
  properties_staged <- dbReadTable(staged_data, "df_product_property___staged")

  # Apply business transformations
  properties_transformed <- properties_staged %>%
    mutate(
      # Generate lookup keys
      property_lookup_key = paste0(product_line_id, "_", property_id),

      # Calculate completeness score
      completeness_score = (
        (!is.na(definition)) * 0.3 +
        (!is.na(review_1)) * 0.2 +
        (!is.na(review_2)) * 0.2 +
        (!is.na(review_3)) * 0.3
      ),

      # Assign quality rank
      property_quality_rank = case_when(
        completeness_score >= 0.8 ~ "A",
        completeness_score >= 0.5 ~ "B",
        TRUE ~ "C"
      ),

      # Flag analysis readiness
      is_analysis_ready = completeness_score >= 0.5,

      # Transformation metadata
      transform_timestamp = Sys.time()
    )

  # Write to transformed layer
  dbWriteTable(transformed_data, "df_product_property___transformed", properties_transformed, overwrite = TRUE)

}, error = function(e) {
  stop("2TR failed: ", e$message)
})

autodeinit()
```

## Cross-Platform Product Mapping Pattern

*Added 2025-12-26 - Following DM_R052*

For mapping product IDs across platforms (CBZ SKU ↔ eBay item number ↔ Amazon ASIN), a dedicated mapping table with surrogate key supports M:N (many-to-many) relationships.

### Why M:N Relationship Support?

| Scenario | Example |
|----------|---------|
| **1 SKU → N eBay** | Same product listed in different colors, each as separate eBay listing |
| **N SKU → 1 eBay** | Bundle/combo pack containing multiple SKUs |

### 0IM: Import Product Mapping

```r
# all_ETL_product_mapping_0IM___MAMBA.R
#' Following: DM_R052 (Cross-Platform Product Identification)
#' Following: DM_R037 (Company-Specific ETL Naming)

autoinit()

tryCatch({
  # Read from Excel (product mapping source)
  excel_path <- file.path(g_project_root,
    "data/local_data/rawdata_MAMBA/SKUtoeBay numbers/SKUtoeBay number.xlsx")

  df_mapping_raw <- read_excel(excel_path, sheet = "sku details", skip = 5)

  # Standardize columns with surrogate key
  df_product_mapping <- df_mapping_raw %>%
    transmute(
      sku = as.character(SKU),
      eby_item_id = as.character(`eBay number`),
      amz_asin = NA_character_,  # Reserved for Amazon
      product_name = as.character(Name),
      product_line_name = as.character(`Product Line`),
      color_variant = NA_character_  # For M:N tracking
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sku) | !is.na(eby_item_id)) %>%
    mutate(mapping_id = row_number())  # Surrogate key

  # Write to app_data (metadata table)
  dbWriteTable(app_con, "df_product_mapping", df_product_mapping, overwrite = TRUE)

  message("Imported ", nrow(df_product_mapping), " product mappings")

}, error = function(e) {
  stop("Product mapping ETL failed: ", e$message)
})

autodeinit()
```

### Product Mapping Schema (M:N Design)

```yaml
df_product_mapping:
  - mapping_id: INTEGER      # PK, auto-increment (Surrogate Key)
  - sku: STRING              # CBZ/Official SKU (allows duplicates, nullable)
  - eby_item_id: STRING      # eBay item number (allows duplicates, nullable)
  - amz_asin: STRING         # Amazon ASIN (reserved, nullable)
  - product_name: STRING     # Product name
  - product_line_name: STRING # Product line
  - color_variant: STRING    # Color variant (optional, for M:N tracking)
```

### M:N Relationship Examples

| mapping_id | sku | eby_item_id | Explanation |
|------------|-----|-------------|-------------|
| 1 | A001 | 12345 | Standard 1:1 mapping |
| 2 | A001 | 12346 | Same SKU, different color (1:N) |
| 3 | A002 | 99999 | Bundle product (N:1) |
| 4 | A003 | 99999 | Bundle product (N:1) |

### Usage in DRV Scripts

```r
# Join CBZ data with eBay equivalents
# Following: DM_R052
cbz_data %>%
  left_join(tbl2(app_con, "df_product_mapping"), by = "sku")

# Join eBay data with CBZ equivalents
eby_data %>%
  left_join(tbl2(app_con, "df_product_mapping"),
            by = c("ebay_item_number" = "eby_item_id"))

# Handle M:N in aggregation
cbz_sales %>%
  left_join(mapping, by = "sku") %>%
  group_by(sku) %>%
  summarize(
    total_sales = sum(amount),
    eby_listing_count = n_distinct(eby_item_id)
  )
```

### Key Design Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| **Primary Key** | Surrogate (`mapping_id`) | NULL handling, M:N support |
| **SKU/eBay columns** | Allow duplicates + NULL | Partial data, M:N relationships |
| **Storage location** | `app_data.duckdb` | Metadata table |
| **File suffix** | `___MAMBA` | Company-specific mapping |

## Standard Output Schemas

### Product Profile Schema

```yaml
df_product_profile_{line}___transformed:
  - product_id: STRING          # Unique product identifier
  - product_title: STRING       # UTF-8 product name
  - product_brand: STRING       # Brand name
  - price: DOUBLE               # Product price
  - rating: DOUBLE              # Average rating (1-5)
  - num_rating: INTEGER         # Number of ratings
  - price_tier: STRING          # budget/mid/premium/luxury
  - product_line_id: STRING     # Product line identifier
  - transform_timestamp: TIMESTAMP
  - schema_version: STRING
```

### Product Property Schema

```yaml
df_product_property___transformed:
  - property_lookup_key: STRING   # Primary lookup key
  - product_line_id: STRING       # Product line
  - property_id: INTEGER          # Property identifier
  - property_name: STRING         # Chinese name
  - property_name_english: STRING # English name
  - definition: STRING            # Property definition
  - completeness_score: DOUBLE    # 0-1 quality score
  - property_quality_rank: STRING # A/B/C rank
  - is_analysis_ready: BOOLEAN    # Ready for analysis flag
  - transform_timestamp: TIMESTAMP
```

## Configuration-Driven Column Mapping

Use YAML-based column aliases for flexible mapping:

```yaml
# In app_config.yaml
list_colname_aliases:
  standard_names:
    product_brand:
      - "brand"
      - "Brand"
    product_id:
      - "asin"
      - "ASIN"
      - "product_code"
    product_title:
      - "title"
      - "Title"
    price:
      - "Price"
    rating:
      - "Rating"
```

## Special Considerations

### Multi-Product Line Processing

```r
# Process each product line independently
for (product_line in active_product_lines) {
  process_product_line(product_line)
}
```

### Google Sheets Timeout Handling

```r
# Retry mechanism for API timeouts
max_attempts <- 3
for (attempt in 1:max_attempts) {
  result <- tryCatch({
    googlesheets4::read_sheet(sheet_id, sheet = sheet_name)
  }, error = function(e) {
    if (grepl("Timeout", e$message) && attempt < max_attempts) {
      Sys.sleep(5)
      NULL
    } else {
      stop(e)
    }
  })
  if (!is.null(result)) break
}
```

## Validation Requirements

| Phase | Validation | Action |
|-------|-----------|--------|
| **0IM** | Sheet exists, rows > 0 | Skip sheet if missing |
| **1ST** | Required fields present, types valid | Log warnings |
| **2TR** | No duplicate product_ids | Deduplicate by most recent |

## Related Documentation

- [index.qmd](index.qmd) - CH11 Overview
- [01_sales_pipeline.qmd](01_sales_pipeline.qmd) - Sales patterns
- [05_etl_independence.qmd](05_etl_independence.qmd) - Independence requirements

---

*Consolidated from `04_products_pipeline/` directory on 2025-12-24*
